failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: train-only fast favorable-excursion capture score surface ranking closed-bar long and short candidates by early MFE and giveback avoidance before schedule replay
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0003 work must change a meaningful path-conditioned exit, hold, risk-shape, label, model, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0003 by only nudging fast-capture target, stop, trail, max-hold, or daily entry count
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 7 losing folds, 2 profitable folds, and negative total tick net PnL despite proxy entry frequency landing inside the target range

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar logic parity passed exactly, and tick execution improved total net PnL by 26.16 versus logic while still remaining negative; tick remains the economic surface.
Fast favorable-excursion capture increased activity to 5.95 entries per active day but did not produce robust fold-isolated tick profitability.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether train-only fast favorable-excursion capture scoring can improve US100 M5 MT5 tick economics by ranking candidates for early MFE and scheduling short-hold profit capture before path giveback
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: third C0003 true variant; changes the R0001 path-survival and R0002 adverse-path avoidance questions into fast favorable-excursion capture and giveback avoidance using different labels, features, score interpretation, and trade-shape construction; it is not a target, stop, max-hold, hazard-threshold, or daily-entry nudge of R0001 or R0002

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must derive fast favorable-excursion capture surfaces only inside each rolling train window
proxy must report entry frequency, early-MFE capture, giveback diagnostics, and short-hold exit diagnostics without creating selected claims
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 is attempted
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure

feature.summary: closed-bar fast-MFE features for directional thrust, compression release, close strength, impulse range, volatility slope, short-horizon pullback, session phase, and prior giveback tendency; no feature set is selected

label.summary: train-only early favorable-excursion and giveback labels rewarding target-like MFE within the first few bars and penalizing paths that give back favorable movement or require long holds; no label is selected

model.summary: rolling train-only fast favorable-capture stump score surface for ranking candidates by early MFE capture quality and assigning quick-capture or brief-follow-through profiles; no model family, objective, or score threshold is selected

trade_logic.summary: evaluate broad closed-bar long and short candidate events with fixed-lot discovery, select daily high early-capture candidates, and schedule short-hold stop, target, trail, and time-stop behavior intended to harvest early MFE before giveback
